data.title: Tsingke Biotech launches new website today to simplify global biotech R&D and translational services access.
data.description: On January 20, 2026, Beijing Tsingke Biotech Co., Ltd., a prominent biotechnology firm, revealed the release of its updated worldwide website. The new website is designed to streamline access to the company's wide range of biotech research and development (R&D) as well as translational services. This update comes as the company continues to make significant progress in their field.

data.title: Mongolian Mining Corp releases unaudited operational update for quarter ended Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: Mongolian Mining Corporation has released an unaudited operational update for the quarter ending on December 31, 2025. The report covers key metrics and performance indicators for the company during this period.

data.title: Johnson & Johnson faces key quarter as they anticipate $10B loss from Stelara; bets on newer therapies to offset decline.
data.description: Johnson & Johnson, a leading pharmaceutical company (NYSE: JNJ), is gearing up to announce its fourth-quarter results, facing a critical juncture in its recent history. Investors are closely watching to see if the company can fill the revenue gap left by its former top-selling immunology drug, Stelara. Stelara once brought in nearly $10 billion annually but is now on the decline due to the entry of biosimilar versions into the U.S. market after losing exclusivity. In the last quarter, J&J reported a 42% drop in sales compared to the previous year, attributing this decrease to biosimilar competition. The company is banking on a range of new therapies to counteract this decline, with the management spotlighting the success of its Oncology drug, Darzalex. This shift marks a pivotal moment for J&J as it navigates through this challenging phase.

data.title: Atos and Graia team up for real-time voice translation tech in service desk ops to break language barriers.
data.description: Atos and Graia have joined forces to incorporate advanced bi-directional voice translation technology into their service desk operations. This innovative partnership aims to enhance customer experience by facilitating seamless communication between agents and customers, irrespective of their language preferences. The incorporation of this cutting-edge technology is expected to significantly improve the efficiency and effectiveness of service desk interactions.

data.title: Amentum and Rolls-Royce SMR partner to build 1.5GW of low-carbon energy in UK, creating 8,000+ jobs. Collaboration agreement signed.
data.description: Amentum, a global advanced engineering and technology solutions leader, has been chosen as the program delivery partner for the initial installations of the Rolls-Royce Small Modular Reactor (SMR). The Rolls-Royce SMR project in the UK aims to provide up to 1.5GW of low-carbon energy to the grid, aiding the UK's net zero objectives and generating over 8,000 long-term British employment opportunities. A collaborative agreement has been inked between Rolls-Royce SMR and Amentum for this initiative.

data.title: AI/works™ by Thoughtworks revolutionizes software dev for tech modernization and greenfield projects. Chicago, Jan. 20, 2026.
data.description: A new agentic development platform has been introduced by Thoughtworks in Chicago on January 20, 2026. Thoughtworks is a renowned global technology consultancy firm known for its expertise in design, engineering, and AI for digital innovation. This platform is designed to facilitate technology modernization and greenfield development projects. It aims to support organizations in adapting to modern technological trends and addressing new development opportunities efficiently. Innovations like this are crucial in the rapidly evolving tech landscape, and Thoughtworks continues to lead the way with its cutting-edge solutions.

data.title: GIBO Holdings Ltd. in Malaysia advances its AI mobility roadmap with GIBO.ai Calculation Engine across air and ground platforms.
data.description: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, on January 20, 2026, GIBO Holdings Ltd. revealed its latest advancements in AI technology. A prominent player in Asia's AI ecosystem, the company (NASDAQ: GIBO) showcased its updated AI mobility roadmap. This move will enhance the GIBO.ai Calculation Engine, further progressing towards a cohesive intelligence stack spanning various domains.

data.title: Ascletis chooses ASC37, a once-monthly subcutaneously administered peptide agonist, with 17-day half-life, for clinical development.
data.description: ASC37 has shown to have an average observed half-life of around 17 days in head-to-head non-human primate studies, which is 7 times longer than retatrutide. This indicates its potential for once-monthly subcutaneous dosing in humans. Additionally, ASC37 exhibited approximately 5-, 4-, and 4-fold greater in vitro activity compared to other substances.

data.title: Zadarma launches multilingual AI Voice Agent for global users, improving customer service with natural voice.
data.description: A global VoIP service provider, Zadarma, has introduced the Zadarma AI Voice Agent on Jan. 20, 2026. This virtual assistant is designed to manage calls, utilizing a natural and realistic voice to interact with customers both during and after business hours. The AI voice agent aims to enhance customer communication by providing continuous assistance.

data.title: Only 6% of private healthcare investment goes to women's health despite women making up almost half of the population.
data.description: A recent report by the World Economic Forum in collaboration with BCG revealed that women's health receives a mere 6% of private healthcare investment, despite women making up almost 50% of the global population. The study, titled the 2026 Women's Health Investment Outlook, highlights the stark disparity in funding allocation. This imbalance poses a significant challenge as women's health needs remain underfunded and neglected, impacting a substantial portion of society. The limited available funds predominantly flow towards other areas of healthcare, which indicates a pressing need for increased investment and prioritization in women's health initiatives.
